overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a wizard character exploring a medieval stone kitchen or potions classroom. The character walks from left to right across the room, passing large cauldrons and wooden shelves before exiting through a doorway on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle kitchen with stone walls and large windows

agents.ego_description: walking along the left stone wall examining a large cauldron sitting on a wooden table

entered.detail: large iron cauldron with a tag hanging on it, sitting on a wooden table
rough stone wall with a large multi-paned window letting in bright daylight
long wooden workbench with various small pots and containers
metal pots and cauldrons suspended from a rack against the back wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a medieval stone room with warm lighting filtering through a large window. The character walks along the left wall past a substantial iron cauldron resting on a wooden table, with various cooking vessels visible on shelves ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: central cooking area with stove and wooden door

events.description: character turns slightly right while walking toward the center wooden door

agents.ego_description: moving toward the center of the room passing wooden shelves with hanging pots and approaching a large stove

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with metal studs at the end of the room
ornate wall-mounted candle holder with lit candles
massive iron cauldron sitting over a stone fireplace or stove

segments.scene_description: The character moves into the central area of the kitchen, revealing a heavy wooden door at the far end and a large cauldron simmering on a stove to the right. The camera passes the initial workbench as the character adjusts course slightly toward the right side of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: right side of room with exit doorway and storage ladder

events.description: character exits through the right doorway and camera continues into the adjacent space

agents.ego_description: exiting through the right doorway while the camera continues to pan across the empty room

entered.detail: open doorway leading to an adjacent room or corridor
second large window on the right wall with multiple panes
tall wooden ladder leaning against the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character disappears through the right doorway as the camera continues moving forward, revealing a wooden ladder and a second window on the right wall. The heavy wooden door from the previous segment is now visible on the left side of the frame as the camera approaches the exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval stone kitchen that transitions from a cozy workspace into an open exit. It begins along the left wall where warm light filters through a large window, passing a substantial iron cauldron resting on a wooden table. As the character moves into the central area, the view expands to reveal a simmering cauldron on a stove to the right and a heavy wooden door at the far end. The scene then shifts toward the right side of the room, passing a workbench before the character disappears through a doorway. Finally, the camera continues forward to reveal a wooden ladder and a second window on the right wall as the heavy wooden door recedes to the left.
